mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_messages (chat_room_id, sender_id, content, message_type, reference_type, reference_id, created_at) VALUES (#{chatRoomId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, #{messageType}, #{referenceType}, #{referenceId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_messages WHERE chat_room_id = #{chatRoomId} AND id > COALESCE(#{afterId}, 0)
